summary: Completed comprehensive testing of dashboard UI/UX modernization. All backend APIs working correctly (8/8 tests passed). Frontend successfully loads with full-width modern layout, functional task management, and navy-toned dark mode. No breaking changes to existing functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and CORS configuration
Profile and program data retrieval from seeded test data
Task creation and update functionality via API
Dashboard loads successfully with dev auth bypass
Plain text 'izlek' brand displays correctly in header
Full-width layout implemented (no max-w centered containers)
Spacious hero section with user greeting and quick actions
Desktop 70/30 grid layout (Today Tasks / Weekly Program)
Add task dialog opens and closes correctly
Weekly program tabs functional (all 7 days + extras)
Theme toggle works with navy-toned dark mode
All navigation buttons present and accessible
